title: Receipt v1
description: Schema for a model mapping and materialization receipt. Captures timing, resource usage, and admission decisions during model-open operations on Apple Silicon.

verification_time_ms.description: Time in milliseconds spent verifying model integrity.

mapping_time_ms.description: Time in milliseconds spent mapping model segments into memory.

binding_time_ms.description: Time in milliseconds spent binding segments to the GPU.

materialization_time_ms.description: Total time in milliseconds for model materialization.

mapped_virtual_bytes.description: Total virtual address space mapped in bytes.

expected_resident_bytes.description: Expected physical memory footprint in bytes.

observed_rss_delta.description: Observed change in resident set size in bytes (may be negative).

mlx_active_delta.description: Change in mlx active memory in bytes.

mlx_cache_delta.description: Change in mlx cache memory in bytes.

file_read_bytes.description: Bytes read from storage during materialization.

page_faults.description: Number of page faults incurred during materialization.

tensor_aliases_reused.description: Number of tensor aliases reused from cache.

admission_estimate.description: Estimated memory cost used for admission (bytes or abstract units).

admission_decision.description: Admission decision for the model load.
